name: Bite-Size Pepperoni Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the muffins and toast them.
2. Spread pizza sauce on both halves of each muffin.
3. Top with onions.
4. Cut each muffin half into four pieces.
5. Place eight muffin pieces in a circle around the edge of a paper plate (four plates used).
6. Lay one-quarter section of green pepper on top of each muffin piece.
7. Place one-half slice of pepperoni on top of each muffin piece.
8. Top evenly with mozzarella cheese.
9. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 1 minute; rotate each plate halfway after 30 seconds.
One Serving:
Calories: 45
Carbohydrates: 3
Exchange: 1/4 bread; 1/3 medium-fat meat
Source: Diabetic Microwave Cookbook, by Mary Jane Finsand (1989)
Shared by: Norman R. Brown
